top_signals.title: VPS: Fuel Quality Management for Vessels in Extended Idle
top_signals.summary: Since the closure of the Strait of Hormuz to most commercial shipping in late February 2026, an estimated 1,550 vessels, carrying approximately 20,000 seafarers, have been unable to transit, or have chosen to remain at anchor in the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and approaches.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Fast Retail Firm Zepto Files for Biggest India IPO This Year
top_signals.summary: Rapid-commerce company Zepto Ltd. has filed updated paperwork for what’s set to be India’s biggest initial public offering this year, bringing to market one of the key companies in a fast-growing industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
top_signals.summary: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
